title: beholder-tau-ceti: Reproducibility kit for the RNAAS note on tau Ceti's RV planets
description: Source code, data, scripts, and LaTeX source for the Research Note of the American Astronomical Society (RNAAS) submission titled 'τ Ceti's radial-velocity planets re-examined: cross-validated K-deficit, bimodal candidate f, and a Bayes-factor reversal at higher nested-sampling resolution.' The work re-analyses 23 years of multi-instrument radial-velocity data (HARPS, HIRES, ESPRESSO, APF) within a joint Bayesian framework, cross-validated against the RadVel package.
